## Summary

Provide a short description of the feature or improvement you want to propose.

---

## Problem Statement

What operational problem does this solve?

Describe the current gap, friction, or limitation in disaster-response coordination, volunteer readiness verification, deployment planning, or field execution.

- [ ] Improves volunteer confidence and clarity
- [ ] Reduces unsafe deployment decisions
- [ ] Improves route/logistics awareness

- [ ] Improves trust, ratings, or feedback loops

- [ ] Other:

- [ ] AI-generated planning
- [ ] AI clarification or support
- [ ] Readiness checks
- [ ] Qualification decisions

## Risks / Considerations

Are there any risks, dependencies, or constraints?

Examples:
- user confusion
- operational overload
- incorrect AI guidance
- dependency on external systems
- role-based access constraints
- regional or safety considerations

Add screenshots, mockups, examples, linked docs, or other supporting context here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have explained the problem clearly
- [ ] I identified the affected user persona

- [ ] I included acceptance criteria
- [ ] I explained the operational value
- [ ] I considered AI/readiness implications
